user.title: Set up Alexa Announcement Builder
user.description: Create the integration entry to enable the Alexa Announcement Builder action. No account credentials or device selection are required.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Alexa Announcement Builder is already configured.

send.name: Send Alexa announcement
send.description: Build Alexa SSML and send it through a notify entity.

target.name: Target
target.description: Alexa Devices notify entity that will receive the SSML.

text.name: Text
text.description: Plain text to escape and convert to SSML.

voice.name: Voice
voice.description: Select the Alexa default behavior or a named Amazon Polly voice.

rate.name: Rate
rate.description: Select a named rate or enter a percentage from 20 to 200.

pitch.name: Pitch
pitch.description: Select a named pitch or enter a percentage from -33.3 to 50.

volume.name: Volume
volume.description: Select a named volume or enter a dB adjustment from -6 to 6.

whisper.name: Whisper
whisper.description: Apply the Alexa whispered speech effect.

emotion_intensity.name: Emotion intensity
emotion_intensity.description: Intensity used when an emotion is selected.

break_before_ms.name: Break before
break_before_ms.description: Silent break before speech, in milliseconds.

break_after_ms.name: Break after
break_after_ms.description: Silent break after speech, in milliseconds.

raw_ssml.name: Raw SSML
raw_ssml.description: Trusted SSML contents to send unchanged instead of generated speech.
